stemHtml:
Which interpretation of the following message is correct?

LFLD AD WRNG 1 VALID 050300/050700 RIME ICE OBS=

options.a: Rime Ice observed by arriving or departing traffic at 0300 z and will be predicted to stay until 0700 z.
options.b: Rime Ice was observed at 300 ft.
options.c: AD warning about Rime Ice which was observed in the airport and also affecting parked aircraft, valid from 0300 z to 0700 z
options.d: Rime Ice is forecast at 0300 z.
